description: Narrated screen recordings into agent-ready data: local transcript, keyframes, OCR, wall-clock.
name: io.github.korovin-aa97/talkthrough-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Whisper model (tiny|base|small|medium|large-v3|large-v3-turbo). Default: small. Use large-v3-turbo for non-English narration; the process_media `model` param overrides per call.
environmentVariables.name: TALKTHROUGH_WHISPER_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'off' to disable OCR of keyframes. Default: on.
environmentVariables.name: TALKTHROUGH_OCR

environmentVariables.description: Recognition script for on-screen text: a language code (ru, ja, ko, ar, hi, ...) or a RapidOCR pack name (eslav, cyrillic, ...). Default: Latin+Chinese.
environmentVariables.name: TALKTHROUGH_OCR_LANG
